sub.teachers.title: Resources for Teachers
sub.teachers.desc: 192 curated free tools across 16 teaching clusters. Pick a topic below to explore the 12 best resources.
teachers.picker.label: Explore by Topic
teachers.picker.heading: Choose one of the 16 teaching clusters to discover the best free tools
teachers.filter.label: Filter by stage:
teachers.sec.planning.label: Curriculum & Lesson Design
teachers.sec.planning.h2: Lesson Planning & Curriculum — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.planning.desc: Build standards-aligned units, weekly plans and ready-to-teach lessons in minutes — free templates and full open curricula.
teachers.sec.ai.label: AI Assistants for Teachers
teachers.sec.ai.h2: AI Co-pilots for Teachers — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.ai.desc: Generate lesson plans, rubrics, differentiated worksheets and feedback in seconds — free AI tools built for educators.
teachers.sec.interactive.label: Slides, Videos & Interactives
teachers.sec.interactive.h2: Interactive Lessons & Slides — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.interactive.desc: Turn any lesson into an interactive experience — embed quizzes, polls, drawings and discussions live in the classroom.
teachers.sec.assessment.label: Quizzes, Rubrics & Feedback
teachers.sec.assessment.h2: Assessment, Quizzes & Feedback — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.assessment.desc: Check understanding fast, build rubrics, and give meaningful feedback — formative tools, exit tickets and graded quizzes.
teachers.sec.management.label: Behaviour & Routines
teachers.sec.management.h2: Classroom Management & Engagement — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.management.desc: Build positive routines, recognise good behaviour, and run smooth daily classroom systems — free tools that respect students.
teachers.sec.admin.label: Attendance, Grades & Files
teachers.sec.admin.h2: Attendance, Grading & Admin — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.admin.desc: Cut down on paperwork — free LMS, gradebooks, attendance trackers and file-sharing tools that just work.
teachers.sec.comms.label: Family & Community
teachers.sec.comms.h2: Parent & Community Communication — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.comms.desc: Reach every family in their language and on their terms — secure messaging, newsletters and translation tools.
teachers.sec.visual.label: Whiteboards & Mind Maps
teachers.sec.visual.h2: Visual Thinking & Brainstorming — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.visual.desc: Make student thinking visible — collaborative whiteboards, mind maps, sticky-note boards and concept-mapping tools.
teachers.sec.content.label: Worksheets, Video & Visuals
teachers.sec.content.h2: Content Creation: Worksheets, Video & Visuals — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.content.desc: Create polished worksheets, infographics, podcasts and videos — no design skills required, all free for teachers.
teachers.sec.inclusion.label: Inclusion & Special Needs
teachers.sec.inclusion.h2: Differentiation, Inclusion & SEN — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.inclusion.desc: Reach every learner — adaptive readers, accessibility tools, dyslexia-friendly fonts and SEN-specific resources.
teachers.sec.language.label: ELL, ESL & Writing Support
teachers.sec.language.h2: Language Support & Writing Help — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.language.desc: Support EAL/ESL learners and strengthen every student's writing — translation, grammar, vocabulary and reading tools.
teachers.sec.wellbeing.label: Teacher Mental Health & Self-Care
teachers.sec.wellbeing.h2: Teacher Wellbeing & Self-Care — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.wellbeing.desc: Look after yourself first — free mental-health, mindfulness and burnout-prevention resources made for educators.
teachers.sec.stem.label: Simulations & Virtual Labs
teachers.sec.stem.h2: STEM Labs & Simulations — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.stem.desc: Run physics, chemistry, biology and maths experiments in any classroom — free interactive simulations and virtual labs.
teachers.sec.creative.label: Creative Studios
teachers.sec.creative.h2: Art, Music & Creative Studios — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.creative.desc: Free studios for music, drawing, animation and audio — perfect for art lessons, cross-curricular projects and clubs.
teachers.sec.homework.label: At-Home Learning for Parents
teachers.sec.homework.h2: Homework & Family Learning — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.homework.desc: Recommend safe, effective resources to families — homework support, revision tools and at-home learning for parents.
teachers.sec.pd.label: Professional Development
teachers.sec.pd.h2: Further Education for Teachers — 12 Best Free Tools
teachers.sec.pd.desc: Free CPD, micro-credentials and certificates from Coursera, edX, Microsoft, Google, Apple and the Open University.
cd_t_000: Free standards-aligned reading lessons grades 3-12 — texts, questions, assessments and full ELA units, all in one place.
cd_t_001: Free PK-12 ELA and math curriculum from New York State — full year-long modules, teacher guides and student workbooks.
cd_t_002: Free K-12 STEM curriculum library — engineering-focused lessons and hands-on activities aligned to NGSS and Common Core.
cd_t_003: Free Common Core-aligned tasks, lessons and unit planning tools from the team that wrote the standards — ELA and math.
cd_t_004: Over 420,000 free lesson plans, activities and units shared by AFT teachers — searchable by subject, grade and standard.
cd_t_005: The free section of TPT — millions of teacher-made worksheets, units and printables filtered to the no-cost track.
cd_t_006: Free UK-curriculum-aligned resources from the world's largest teaching community — full schemes of work and lesson packs.
cd_t_007: Free curriculum-mapped video clips and ready-made lessons from the BBC — strong on history, science and English literature.
cd_t_008: Free top-rated open math and ELA curricula (6-8 Math by Illustrative Math, EL Education ELA) — full year-long courses.
cd_t_009: Free reusable lesson frames any teacher can drop content into — Cyber Sandwich, Iron Chef, Worst Preso Ever and more.
cd_t_010: Free UbD planning templates and starter kits — backward design from learning goals to evidence to instruction.
cd_t_011: Lightweight digital lesson planner — free 30-day trial then a low-cost paid tier; weekly grid view loved by classroom teachers.
cd_t_012: 60+ teacher-built AI tools — lesson plans, IEP goals, rubrics, differentiation and feedback. Generous free tier for educators.
cd_t_013: AI-generated interactive lessons in 30 seconds — slides, polls, drawings and exit tickets, with a strong free plan for teachers.
cd_t_014: Adapt any text to any reading level instantly — leveled passages, vocabulary and questions; the gold-standard differentiation AI.
cd_t_015: 100+ generators for lesson plans, assessments and accommodations — free tier covers most everyday classroom needs.
cd_t_016: Anthropic's flagship AI assistant — exceptional for lesson planning, rubric writing, parent emails and feedback drafting.
cd_t_017: OpenAI's free tier covers GPT-4o mini — strong for question generation, summaries and worksheet creation.
cd_t_018: Google's AI deeply integrated with Docs, Slides and Drive — ideal for teachers already living in Google Workspace.
cd_t_019: Free AI inside Word, OneNote, PowerPoint — generate lesson outlines, slide decks and student handouts in place.
cd_t_020: Free Chrome extension that adds an AI sidebar to Google Docs and Slides — instant feedback, leveling and rubrics.
cd_t_021: Safe, monitored AI chat 'spaces' for students plus an AI assistant for teachers — generous free tier for K-12.
cd_t_022: Upload your textbook chapters and notes — Google's AI answers strictly from your sources, with audio summaries for revision.
cd_t_023: Anthropic's free course on the four core AI competencies — delegation, description, discernment, diligence. Built for educators.
cd_t_024: Interactive slide lessons with built-in polls, quizzes, drawings and VR — free Silver tier covers most classroom needs.
cd_t_025: Add interactive questions to Google Slides or PowerPoint — free tier supports the most-loved formative-assessment formats.
cd_t_026: Embed questions and notes directly in any video — free for teachers (up to 20 stored videos) with full analytics.
cd_t_027: Drag-and-drop digital lessons combining videos, slides, articles and quizzes on one page — free for teachers.
cd_t_028: Build interactive lessons with polls, instant feedback and student devices — free for individual teachers.
cd_t_029: Canva's full Pro suite is free for verified K-12 teachers — slides, infographics, videos and student-facing classes.
cd_t_030: Create interactive presentations, escape rooms and infographics — free tier with hundreds of educator templates.
cd_t_031: Add hotspots to images and videos with text, audio and links — free Basic tier covers small-class use.
cd_t_032: Free unlimited screen-recording for verified teachers — record flipped-classroom videos with built-in viewer engagement.
cd_t_033: Free screencasting tool with classroom-friendly captions and easy hosting — used by millions of educators.
cd_t_034: Free all-in-one classroom display — timer, random name picker, traffic light, work-symbols and noise meter on one screen.
cd_t_035: Free curation tool — organise videos, articles, tweets and student work into shareable collections for any lesson.
cd_t_036: The classic game-show quiz format — free Basic tier supports up to 40 players for live formative assessment.
cd_t_037: Self-paced AI-powered quizzes and lessons — free for teachers with extensive question banks and live mode.
cd_t_038: Live polls, word clouds and Q&A from the audience — free tier covers small-class formative assessment perfectly.
cd_t_039: Live polls, surveys and Q&A overlay for any meeting or class — free tier supports up to 100 participants.
cd_t_040: Free auto-graded quizzes with instant feedback and analytics — the workhorse for assessment in Google Classroom.
cd_t_041: Free quizzes and surveys with auto-grading and branching logic — included with any Microsoft account.
cd_t_042: Quick quizzes, exit tickets and Space Race game — free for up to 50 students per room.
cd_t_043: Paper QR cards plus phone scan — formative assessment with zero student devices, free for up to 60 cards.
cd_t_044: Templated quiz games — match-up, anagram, gameshow — generate any activity from one wordlist; free up to 5 saved.
cd_t_045: See student responses live as they type — drawings, equations, paragraphs. Free Bronze tier covers core formative use.
cd_t_046: Free Google Sheets add-on for self-, peer- and teacher-rubric assessment — generates personalised feedback per student.
cd_t_047: AP and SAT/ACT exam-prep questions with detailed explanations — free trial and ongoing free practice on many topics.
cd_t_048: Build a positive classroom culture — points, parent messages and student portfolios. Free for all teachers and parents.
cd_t_049: Gamified classroom-management platform — students earn XP and powers for good behaviour. Generous free tier.
cd_t_050: Visual classroom noise meter that animates with sound levels — free Lite version is loved by primary teachers.
cd_t_051: Free fun visual noise meter — bouncing balls react to classroom volume. Perfect background tool during group work.
cd_t_052: Free random name picker — spin the wheel to choose students fairly. Saved lists, custom colours and ad-free.
cd_t_053: Free fun classroom timers — bombs, candles, race cars — keep activities on schedule with engaging visuals.
cd_t_054: All-in-one classroom display — timer, work-symbols, traffic light, random picker and noise meter together.
cd_t_055: Schoolwide positive-behaviour reinforcement platform — free trial; many free PBIS resources available on the site.
cd_t_056: Free movement and mindfulness videos — short brain breaks proven to refocus K-5 students mid-lesson.
cd_t_057: Free morning meeting greetings, activities and message ideas — research-based social-emotional classroom community.

cd_t_059: The UK's most-followed teaching blog — free practical strategies for behaviour, engagement and routines.
cd_t_060: The default free LMS for millions of teachers — assignments, grading, communication and file sharing in one place.
